name: hello-world
description: A simple skill that demonstrates shell, http, and script tool types

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Checks if a URL is healthy

prompts: This skill demonstrates how to use shell, HTTP, and script tools.
Use the greet tool with a name parameter to print a greeting.
Use the get_time tool to get the current time.
Use the check_health tool with a path argument to check URL health.
Use the run_script tool to execute Python code.
